queue_item.action: Build a machine-readable effective-state resolver that combines canonical queue entries with owner-scoped additive updates while refusing cross-owner mutation and unsupported execution claims.

progress.verification: GitHub accepted additive source and test commits; runtime test execution remains explicitly unverified in this connector-only run.
progress.privacy_boundary: public repository metadata and abstract operational claims only

queue_item.handoff: Continuity Mining should next add a repository inventory adapter that discovers owner-scoped queue-update records deterministically, orders them by retained provenance rather than filename alone, and feeds them into the resolver with duplicate and missing-commit detection.

shared_state_policy: Additive queue update only. ACTIVE_QUEUE.json and peer-owned records were not overwritten.
